channel.title: Neueste Beiträge
channel.description: Ein Blog meiner Wahl, schau dich gerne um!

item.title: Blogging Experience - Or why i built a blog from scratch
item.description: As you might have noticed, this is a static site for the most part, containing HTML, CSS and a tiny amount of javascr...

item.description: One of the major mods I'm currently working on is Idrinth Thalui, the Altmer Vampire in Skyrim SE. Besides thousands ...
